metadata.rationale: The article contains a real factual core about Israeli reports of Iranian missile launches, but it misleadingly compresses separate and unevenly verified incidents into a single continuous regional barrage. That impression is reinforced by edited images and by visuals from broader or different contexts being paired with text about the same supposed escalation window.
